headline: Walmart Tests Sam's Club Fee Hike Against Member Value And Growth
summary: Sam's Club, owned by Walmart (NasdaqGS:WMT), is raising annual membership fees for the first time in four years. The company is also increasing the Sam's Cash rewards cap for Plus members as part of the same update. These changes sit alongside plans to open new Sam's Club locations to compete more directly with Costco and BJ's Wholesale Club. Walmart, through Sam's Club, operates in the warehouse club segment where value, bulk purchasing and membership perks are central to customer...
